accepted.reason: Transit mask supersampling/rebinning is a dense image-style kernel with strong optimization relevance.
Integer matrix multiplication is a canonical nested-loop compute kernel for Cython speedup tasks.
Goertzel, iPDFT, and autocorrelation routines are high-signal numerical loops suitable for optimization training.
Vector decoding with normalization/sqrt logic is a compact but realistic math kernel.
Entropy and shuffle-based association scoring provides loop-heavy statistical computation with optimization headroom.

skipped.reason: Mostly conversion/validation helpers around H3 types; limited standalone optimization value.
Cython behavior test for numeric slots is not a target optimization workload.
Keyword-argument semantics test suite is compiler/runtime behavior coverage, not algorithmic compute.
Tiny prange demo has insufficient computational substance for GRPO optimization data.
Very small list-building/counting demo is too trivial for useful optimization training signal.
